description_long: This is a rounded, black ceramic cup with a glossy finish and a prominent handle. The exterior features two distinct white, hand-drawn cartoon faces: one side displays a surprised expression with large round glasses and an open mouth, while the opposite side shows a relaxed, slightly mischievous face with raised eyebrows and a subtle smile. The cup's body is bulbous, providing a generous internal volume for holding liquids. The handle is angular and sturdy, attached at the side for easy gripping. The interior is smooth and black, matching the exterior base color, and the cup lacks any visible branding or text.
description: A glossy black ceramic cup with a rounded body, angular handle, and two white cartoon faces drawn on opposite sides.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the surprised cartoon face featuring large round glasses and an open mouth, and the handle is visible on the right.
description_view_1: The handle is centered, and only the edge of one cartoon face is partially visible, with most of the cup's black surface exposed.
description_view_2: The relaxed cartoon face with raised eyebrows and a subtle smile is visible, with the handle on the left side.
description_view_3: The back of the cup is shown, with the handle centered and only the edges of the cartoon faces visible on either side.
